CustomField.formula: IF ( OR ( AND ( OR ( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'O', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'SH' ), ISPICKVAL( ResultContactStatus__c , '承認済') ), AND ( OR ( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'M', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'JV', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'FeeInquiry' ), ISPICKVAL( InquiryApprovalStatus__c , '承認済') ) ) , true, false )
CustomField.label: 承認済フラグ(リストビュー用)
